---
title: "Interactive Apps"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Interactive Apps}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

Two Shiny apps are available for interactive use without writing any R code.
You can access them online (hosted on Posit Connect Cloud) or run them locally
if you have `dmdprices` installed.

---

## dm+d Price Lookup {#dmd-price-lookup}

Search for medicine prices from the bundled dm+d dataset by name, with
partial, exact, or fuzzy matching.

**Run locally:**

```r
dmdprices::run_dmd_price_lookup()
```

**Online (hosted):**

<!-- Replace the src URL after deploying to Posit Connect Cloud -->
<iframe
  src="https://019cddeb-838e-b63a-f190-73d9b30d54f1.share.connect.posit.cloud/"
  width="100%"
  height="650"
  frameborder="0"
  allow="fullscreen"
  title="dm+d Price Lookup">
  <p>Your browser does not support iframes.
     <a href="https://019cddeb-838e-b63a-f190-73d9b30d54f1.share.connect.posit.cloud/">
       Open the app directly.
     </a>
  </p>
</iframe>

---

## NHS CII Cost Adjuster {#nhs-cii-cost-adjuster}

Inflate or deflate a cost between NHS financial years using the PSSRU
NHS Cost Inflation Index.

**Run locally:**

```r
dmdprices::run_inflate_nhscii()
```

**Online (hosted):**

<!-- Replace the src URL after deploying to Posit Connect Cloud -->
<iframe
  src="https://019cddeb-d072-7c4c-d780-7b435adba4c5.share.connect.posit.cloud/"
  width="100%"
  height="580"
  frameborder="0"
  allow="fullscreen"
  title="NHS CII Cost Adjuster">
  <p>Your browser does not support iframes.
     <a href="https://019cddeb-d072-7c4c-d780-7b435adba4c5.share.connect.posit.cloud/">
       Open the app directly.
     </a>
  </p>
</iframe>

---

## Deploying your own instance

Both apps are included in the package under `inst/shiny/` and can be
deployed to any Shiny-compatible host:

```r
# Deploy to Posit Connect Cloud (free tier)
rsconnect::deployApp(
  appDir    = system.file("shiny", "dmd_price_lookup", package = "dmdprices"),
  appName   = "dmd-price-lookup",
  appTitle  = "dm+d Price Lookup"
)

rsconnect::deployApp(
  appDir    = system.file("shiny", "inflate_nhscii", package = "dmdprices"),
  appName   = "inflate-nhscii",
  appTitle  = "NHS CII Cost Adjuster"
)
```

---

## Data attribution

**dm+d Price Lookup** uses the NHS Dictionary of Medicines and Devices (dm+d),
Week 34 2025 release, published by the NHS Business Services Authority (NHSBSA).
© Crown copyright. Licensed under the
[Open Government Licence v3.0](https://www.nationalarchives.gov.uk/doc/open-government-licence/version/3/).

**NHS CII Cost Adjuster** uses inflation rates from the
[PSSRU Unit Costs of Health and Social Care](https://www.pssru.ac.uk/project-pages/unit-costs/),
published by the Personal Social Services Research Unit (PSSRU), University of
Kent, under the Open Government Licence.

---

## Reporting issues

If you encounter a problem with either app or the underlying package functions,
please open an issue on the
[GitHub issues tracker](https://github.com/w-hardy/dmdprices/issues).
